name: ai-zippy
description: AI Zippy - WordPress FSE Theme + WooCommerce
author: Zippy <dev@zippy.sg>

scripts.dev: concurrently -n vite,admin,blocks,bs -c cyan,blue,magenta,yellow "NODE_ENV=development vite build --config vite.config.parent.js" "NODE_ENV=development vite build --config vite.config.admin.js" "wp-scripts start --webpack-src-dir=src/wp-content/themes/ai-zippy/src/blocks --output-path=src/wp-content/themes/ai-zippy/assets/blocks" "node bs.config.parent.js"
scripts.dev:child: concurrently -n vite,blocks,bs -c cyan,magenta,yellow "NODE_ENV=development vite build --config vite.config.child.js" "wp-scripts start --webpack-src-dir=src/wp-content/themes/ai-zippy-child/src/blocks --output-path=src/wp-content/themes/ai-zippy-child/assets/blocks" "node bs.config.child.js"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n parent,child -c cyan,green "npm run dev" "npm run dev:child"
scripts.build: npm run build:parent && npm run build:child
scripts.build:parent: vite build --config vite.config.parent.js && vite build --config vite.config.admin.js && wp-scripts build --webpack-src-dir=src/wp-content/themes/ai-zippy/src/blocks --output-path=src/wp-content/themes/ai-zippy/assets/blocks
